title: Exemptions
doc_html:
§460.52. Exemptions

            The provisions of this Part shall not apply to any entity contracted with the Louisiana Department of Health to provide fiscal intermediary services in processing claims of the health care providers.

            Acts 2013, No. 358, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2014.
doc_text:
§460.52.  Exemptions
The provisions of this Part shall not apply to any entity contracted with the Louisiana
Department of Health to provide fiscal intermediary services in processing claims of the
health care providers.
Acts 2013, No. 358, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2014.
